drl:
rule "R0"
salience -7
when
    T0($b0_0_0 : f1, $b0_0_1 : f2)
    accumulate( T0(f1 != -3, f2 == true, !(f0 in (100)), f0 >= $b0_0_0, $s0_1 : f0); $a0_1 : min($s0_1) )
then
end
rule "R1"
salience -4
when
    T1(f1 == false, $b1_0_0 : f1, $b1_0_1 : f0)
    exists T1(f0 == false, f0 == $b1_0_1)
    $p1_2 : T1(f0 != $b1_0_1, f1 == false)
then
    $p1_2.setF1(true);
    $p1_2.setF0(true);
    update($p1_2);
end
rule "R2"
salience -8
no-loop
when
    (or $p2_0 : T0(f2 == false) $p2_0 : T0(f2 == false, f0 != 5))
then
    insert(new T1(false, $p2_0.isF2()));
    $p2_0.setF2(true);
    $p2_0.setF1($p2_0.getF0());
    update($p2_0);
end
rule "R3"
when
    T1(f1 == false, $b3_0_0 : f1, $b3_0_1 : f0)
    exists T1(f0 == false, f0 == $b3_0_1)
    T1(f0 != $b3_0_1, f1 == false)
    $p3_3 : T1(f0 != true, f1 != $b3_0_0, $b3_3_0 : f0, $b3_3_1 : f0, f0 == false)
then
    modify($p3_3) { setF0(true) }
end
rule "R4"
when
    ( $p4_0 : T1(f0 != true, f0 != true, f0 == false) )
    or
    ( $p4_0 : T1(f0 != true, f1 != true, f0 == false) )
then
    modify($p4_0) { setF0(true), setF1(true) }
end
rule "R5"
when
    T0(f1 != -2, !(f0 > 3.0), $b5_0_0 : f2, $b5_0_1 : f2)
    T0(f1 != 0, f2 == $b5_0_0)
then
end
